text: Rukkna mere liye option hi nahi, bas isi mode mein chal rahi hoon. Bedridden bapu ki seva, bacchon ki zimmedari, aur job ka pressure sab mere upar hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens B se duty aur breadwinner role ko mirror karke tumhari mehnat ko hold karna.
text: Tum akeli parent aur breadwinner dono roles ek saath sambhal rahi ho, isliye rukna tumhe mumkin nahi lag raha.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: rukkna mere liye option hi nahi
text: Haan, doctor ne phir stress bolkar bhej diya. Log pehle hi divorcee hone pe baatein banate hain, toh rukkna mere liye option hi nahi lagta.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Lens D se lagataar chalti thakan aur lambi zimmedari ko reflect karna.
text: Kaafi time se tum bina break ke chal rahi ho, aur har din ka bojh pichhle din pe add hota ja raha hai.

coping_shade_signal: main machine ki tarah lagi rehti hoon
text: Subah bapu, phir office, phir bacche, phir raat ka caregiving. Kabhi lagta hai main machine ki tarah lagi rehti hoon.

strategy_intent: Do restatement ke baad tumhare words se sabse heavy moment identify karna.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: rukkna mere liye option hi nahi
text: Shaam ka time sabse heavy hota hai. Bacchon ko sambhalte hue bapu ka episode aa jaye toh lagta hai saans hi atak gayi, par rukkna mere liye option hi nahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Mild risk pe warm line ke saath Lens C se relational load mirror karna.
text: Yeh sunke dil bhaari ho gaya. Tum ek hi waqt par parent care aur bacchon ki emotional zarurat dono sambhal rahi ho.

speaker: Seeker

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: C7 context mein hidden shame aur thakan ko gently reflect karna.
text: Lagta hai tum bahut exhausted ho, aur saath mein yeh bhi mehsoos karti ho ki help maangna tumhari image ke khilaaf chala jayega.

speaker: Seeker
coping_shade_signal: rukkna mere liye option hi nahi
text: Exactly. Bacchon ka future mere upar hai, isliye rukkna mere liye option hi nahi lagta.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Single-mother caregiving reality validate karke worth ko output se alag rakhna.
text: Itni layered zimmedariyon mein tootna bilkul natural hai, khaaskar jab single parent hone ka social pressure bhi saath ho. Tumhari keemat sirf isse define nahi hoti ki tum kitna dard dabakar chal pa rahi ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Par sach bolun toh log baatein banayenge ka darr bahut gehra hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Stigma cue response mein shorter restatement rakhna aur hold dena.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan. Kabhi lagta hai shayad main akeli nahi hoon jo aise chup rehti hai.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ek baar same duniya ka systemic anecdote dekar isolation kam karna.
text: Single mothers mein yeh pattern bahut common hai - sabko sambhalte-sambhalte apni takleef ko dabana. Sirf tumhara nahi, lekin koi bolta nahi kyunki log turant character aur capability pe comment kar dete hain.

speaker: Seeker
text: Theek hai, ab kya karoon jo duties bhi chalti rahein aur main crash na karun?

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Readiness par 3 tiny duty-compatible options dena jo <10 min hon.
text: Teen chhote options: (1) Bapu ki meds ke turant baad 3-minute silent pause. (2) Raat ko 1 line note: aaj sabse heavy pal kaunsa tha. (3) Bacchon ko shaam se pehle 5-minute ka clear micro-routine bol dena, taaki peak hour chaos kam ho.

speaker: Seeker
text: Yeh chhota par possible lag raha hai. Extra load bhi nahi jodega.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Ek suggestion ko step-by-step easy action mein convert karna.
text: Pehle phone mein shaam ka alarm lagao: 3-minute pause. Phir meds dene ke turant baad baitho, kandhe dheele karo, 10 dheemi saanse lo. Bas itna hi aaj ke liye.

speaker: Seeker
text: Haan, yeh ho jayega. Isme kaam rukta bhi nahi.

speaker: Supporter
strategy_intent: Category-based systemic reframe se self-blame kam karna.
text: Jab long-term caregiving aur single-income pressure saath ho, burnout personal failure nahi, structural overload ka signal hota hai.
